description: CompositionDark grey polo neck T-shirt made of 100% polyester, has a spread collar, short sleeves with red panel detailing, short buttoned chest placket, red panel detailing on the side seams and embroidered swoosh logo on the upper left chestFittingRegularWash careMachine wash cold with like coloursWash inside outDo not bleach Tumble dry on lowCool ironDo not dry cleanGet ready for an aggressive game of tennis in this dark grey T-shirt from nike. The classic design is updated with red panel detailing and a nike logo, while the Dri-Fit fabric keeps you cool, fresh and comfortable during extended training sessions by wicking sweat away. Team it with track pants and performance shoes.
